This folder should contain self-hosted font files for Playfair Display and Inter in .woff2 format.

If you have network access, download the fonts with these commands (example):

curl -L -o public/fonts/Inter-Variable.woff2 "https://rsms.me/inter/font-files/Inter-Variable.woff2"
curl -L -o public/fonts/PlayfairDisplay-Regular.woff2 "https://github.com/google/fonts/raw/main/ofl/playfairdisplay/PlayfairDisplay-Regular.ttf"

If these exact URLs fail, use the Google Fonts or rsms.me distribution to obtain .woff2 files and place them here.
